name: RPlog_The_Start_of_it_All
title: Loyalty to the Warlord
summary: In a gunship hangar where technicians disguise two X-wings and themselves in New Republic colors for a covert mission, the Sith Warlord Korolov finishes his morning run as the veteran Imperial pilot Jal'Dana Rall arrives. Korolov tests her, demanding not loyalty to the Empire or the New Order but personal loyalty to him alone, pressing into her space and her mind until she relents. Jal'Dana stands her ground as best she can, conceding her obedience while insisting she will be judged by her service rather than favors. Korolov accepts her pledge, claims her as his own instrument, and orders her gear moved aboard for the journey to Coruscant, promising to forge her into a predator who will execute his will -- leaving Jal'Dana to wonder how much of herself will survive the transformation.
